studies.title: A RANDOMIZED, UNCONCLUSED, CONTROLLED CLINICAL STUDY TO EVALUATE THE EFFECTIVENESS AND SAFETY OF THE Ecovery APP IN PATIENTS WITH SUBACUTE TO CHRONIC UNSPECIFIC PAIN OF THE LOWER BACK
A prospective, randomized, group-controlled, unblinded, multicenter pilot study to investigate the eCovery therapy app in patients with non-specific upper back pain

queries_used: "eCovery" AND "Therapie bei Schmerzen im unteren Rücken"
dtx_name: eCovery - Therapie bei Schmerzen im unteren Rücken
